name: stenswf
description: Sten Software Workflow bundle. Issue lifecycle (plan → ship → review → apply, with PRD-mode capstone; plus a lite path: ship-light, plan-light, and slice-e2e one-shot orchestrator), PRD inception (grill-me → prd-from-grill-me → prd-to-issues). Refactor-focused skills (plan-reviewer, test-file-compaction, etc.) now live in the sibling `stenswr` plugin.
